section_title: A person who is interested in the payment of money which another is
content:
69. A person who is interested in the payment of money which another is
of person
bound by law to pay, and who therefore pays it, is entitled to be reimbursed
paying
money due by the other.
by another
Illustration
in payment
of which he B holds land in Bangladesh, on a lease granted by A, the zamindar. The
is interested
revenue payable by A to the Government being in arrear, his lands is
advertised for sale by the Government. Under the
revenue law, the consequence of such sale will be the annulment of B's
lease. B, to prevent the sale and the consequent annulment of his own lease,
pays to the Government the sum due from A. A is bound to make good to B
the amount so paid.
Obligation
